entries.name: Mega Navigation — Product Grid
entries.purpose: Reveal a multi-column product or feature index from a top-bar trigger without leaving the page.
a11y: first item receives focus on open

entries.name: Collapsible Sidebar Rail
entries.purpose: Persistent app navigation that collapses to icon-only rail to reclaim horizontal space.

entries.name: Truncating Breadcrumb
entries.purpose: Show path hierarchy with middle-truncation when ancestor chain exceeds available width.

entries.name: Segmented Tab Control
entries.purpose: Switch between 2-5 sibling views inside a card or panel with an inline pill indicator.

entries.name: Mobile Bottom Navigation
entries.purpose: Five-or-fewer thumb-reachable destinations pinned to the bottom of mobile viewports.

entries.name: Command Palette
entries.purpose: Keyboard-first global search and action launcher invoked via Cmd/Ctrl+K.

entries.name: Anchor Rail with Scrollspy
entries.purpose: Right-rail table of contents that highlights the visible section as the user scrolls long-form content.

entries.name: Sticky Navbar with Shrink
entries.purpose: Top navigation that reduces height and adds elevation as the page scrolls.
a11y: no opacity below WCAG 4.5 on scroll

entries.name: Numbered Pagination
entries.purpose: Discrete page selector with prev/next, current page emphasis, and ellipsis for large ranges.

entries.name: Horizontal Stepper
entries.purpose: Show progression through an N-step process with clear current and completed states.
a11y: screen reader announces step N of M

entries.name: Underline Tab Bar
entries.purpose: Editorial-feeling tab navigation with a sliding underline indicator under the active label.

entries.name: Mobile Drawer Navigation
entries.purpose: Off-canvas full-height navigation panel triggered by hamburger button on mobile.

entries.name: Magnetic Stat Card
entries.purpose: Show one metric with optional delta and sparkline. Magnetic hover for engagement.
a11y: label is visual h-tag mapped to h3

entries.name: Comparison Stat Card
entries.purpose: Show a metric alongside a baseline or target value with explicit comparison delta.
a11y: delta wrapped in screen-reader text like 'up 12 percent'
color not sole carrier of direction

entries.name: Modern Data Table
entries.purpose: Dense tabular data with sortable headers, row hover, sticky first column, and selection.

entries.name: Inline Sparkline Cell
entries.purpose: Tiny inline trend chart inside a table cell or stat card to show a short-term direction.

entries.name: Kanban Board Card
entries.purpose: Draggable task tile representing one unit of work inside a kanban column.
a11y: draggable + keyboard alternative (Space to grab, arrows to move)

entries.name: Vertical Timeline Event
entries.purpose: Single chronological event on a vertical timeline with date, actor, and description.

entries.name: Dense List Item Row
entries.purpose: Compact horizontal row with leading avatar, primary text, secondary text, and trailing action.
a11y: proper button/link role on trailing action

entries.name: Status Dot Badge
entries.purpose: Small colored dot plus label indicating online/offline/busy or similar finite status.
a11y: text label always present, not just color

entries.name: Removable Tag Chip
entries.purpose: Label representing a filter, selection, or category with optional remove affordance.
a11y: remove button has aria-label like 'Remove tag X'
focus moves to next chip after removal

entries.name: Horizontal Metric Bar
entries.purpose: Show a value as a proportion of a max within a horizontal bar, with label and numeric value.

entries.name: Overlapping Avatar Stack
entries.purpose: Show 3-5 user avatars overlapped horizontally with an overflow counter.
a11y: aria-label lists all names or summary

entries.name: Key-Value Definition List
entries.purpose: Two-column read-only rows of property name on left, value on right (used for details/specs).
a11y: key-value pairs read in order by screen readers

entries.name: Pricing Comparison Table
entries.purpose: Side-by-side comparison of plan features with check/cross icons and a recommended-plan highlight.
a11y: icons paired with sr-only words like 'included' or 'not included'

entries.name: Leaderboard Row
entries.purpose: Ranked row with position, avatar, name, score, and trend indicator versus previous period.

entries.name: Expandable Tree Node
entries.purpose: Hierarchical row with chevron toggle, indent, and optional checkbox for nested selection.

entries.name: Input with Leading/Trailing Affix
entries.purpose: Single-line input with a fixed prefix or suffix slot (currency, URL prefix, unit).
a11y: affix is not focusable as input

entries.name: Password Field with Strength Meter
entries.purpose: Password input with show/hide toggle and live strength meter computed from entropy rules.
a11y: criteria are real list, not divs

entries.name: Multi-Step Form Wizard
entries.purpose: Long form chunked into N steps with persistent progress and back/next navigation.
a11y: focus moves to step heading on advance

entries.name: OTP / PIN Input
entries.purpose: Six-digit one-time-password input with auto-advance and paste support.
a11y: single semantic input with visual digit boxes (preferred)

entries.name: Search Bar with Inline Filters
entries.purpose: Search input with filter chips inline that scope or narrow the active query.
a11y: filters announced as part of query

entries.name: Searchable Select / Combobox
entries.purpose: Dropdown select with type-ahead filtering, keyboard navigation, and groupable options.
a11y: Esc closes and restores prior value

entries.name: Tagged Multi-Select
entries.purpose: Pick multiple options that render as removable tags inline with the input.
a11y: Backspace removes last tag when input empty

entries.name: Inline Date Picker
entries.purpose: Calendar grid for selecting a single date with month/year navigation and keyboard arrows.
a11y: screen reader announces full date on focus

entries.name: Date Range Picker
entries.purpose: Pick a start and end date across one or two month grids with a range highlight band.
a11y: start and end dates announced separately

entries.name: International Phone Input
entries.purpose: Phone input with country selector showing flag, dial code, and international formatting.
a11y: format hint is visible and described

entries.name: File Upload Dropzone
entries.purpose: Drag-and-drop file upload area with click fallback and per-file progress.
a11y: fallback file input is keyboard focusable

entries.name: Toggle Switch
entries.purpose: Binary on/off switch for instant-apply settings, larger and clearer than a checkbox.

entries.name: Tri-State Checkbox
entries.purpose: Checkbox supporting checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states for parent rows in trees.

entries.name: Dual Range Slider
entries.purpose: Two handles selecting a min/max value range with a fill between them and live value labels.

entries.name: Auto-Growing Textarea
entries.purpose: Textarea that grows in height as the user types, with optional max-height before scrolling.
a11y: char count uses aria-live=polite at thresholds

entries.name: Center-Anchored Modal
entries.purpose: Standard center-screen modal dialog with backdrop and focus trap for blocking interactions.
a11y: return focus to trigger on close

entries.name: Right-Side Drawer
entries.purpose: Side panel sliding from screen edge for forms, detail views, or settings without full page navigation.

entries.name: Mobile Bottom Sheet
entries.purpose: Bottom-anchored sheet on mobile that snaps to peek, half, or full height with drag handle.

entries.name: Anchored Popover
entries.purpose: Floating panel anchored to a trigger element with smart edge collision avoidance.

entries.name: Hover Tooltip
entries.purpose: Brief explanatory label appearing on hover or focus, with delay-in/delay-out timing.
a11y: tooltip text accessible to screen readers without hover

entries.name: Corner Toast Stack
entries.purpose: Stack of dismissible notifications appearing in a screen corner with auto-dismiss timing.
a11y: aria-live=polite for non-critical, assertive for errors

entries.name: Destructive Alert Dialog
entries.purpose: Confirmation dialog for irreversible actions, requiring explicit user choice (no Esc to dismiss).
a11y: destructive button is not auto-focused (prevent accidental)

entries.name: Right-Click Context Menu
entries.purpose: Floating menu of contextual actions invoked by right-click or long-press on a target element.
a11y: keyboard alternative via Shift+F10 or button

entries.name: Lightbox Image Viewer
entries.purpose: Full-screen image viewer with prev/next navigation, zoom, and caption.
a11y: image alt text visible as caption

entries.name: Primary CTA Stack
entries.purpose: Stacked primary + secondary action pair (e.g., Sign up / Sign in) with strong hierarchy.

entries.name: Magnetic Button
entries.purpose: Button that subtly tracks the cursor within its bounding radius for premium hover feel.

entries.name: Loading Button with Progress
entries.purpose: Button that morphs into a determinate progress indicator during async submit work.
a11y: disabled during submit prevents double click

entries.name: Floating Action Button (Mobile)
entries.purpose: Persistent circular action button fixed bottom-right for the primary screen action.
a11y: z-order does not obscure critical text

entries.name: Icon-Only Button
entries.purpose: Compact action button containing only an icon, for toolbars and dense controls.

entries.name: Split Action Button
entries.purpose: Primary action with a dropdown chevron exposing related secondary actions.
a11y: menu items reached via arrow keys

entries.name: Segmented Button Group
entries.purpose: Group of mutually-exclusive option buttons sharing borders (radio-style selection).

entries.name: Copy-to-Clipboard Button
entries.purpose: Inline button that copies adjacent text or code to clipboard with success confirmation state.

entries.name: Share Action Row
entries.purpose: Horizontal row of share targets (social, copy link, native share) with platform-aware fallback.
a11y: each target labeled with platform name

entries.name: Tiered Pricing Card
entries.purpose: Single plan tier card with price, feature list, and prominent CTA, optionally marked recommended.
a11y: price has clear currency and period
feature list is a real ul

entries.name: Magazine Blog Card
entries.purpose: Editorial-style article card with large headline, byline, date, and category tag, no image.
a11y: card link wraps headline (not whole card) for screen reader sanity

entries.name: E-Commerce Product Card
entries.purpose: Shop product tile with image, name, price, rating, and quick-add or wishlist actions.

entries.name: User Profile Card
entries.purpose: Profile summary card with avatar, name, role, bio snippet, and connection actions.
a11y: actions have clear labels (not just 'Connect' but 'Connect with X')

entries.name: Testimonial Quote Card
entries.purpose: Customer quote card with avatar, name, role, company logo, and decorative quote mark.
a11y: use blockquote element with cite attribute

entries.name: Feature Card with Icon
entries.purpose: Marketing feature highlight card with leading icon, headline, and body copy.

entries.name: Tall Bento Card
entries.purpose: Tall asymmetric card for bento-grid layouts, holding mixed image+text content.

entries.name: Loyalty Stamp Card
entries.purpose: Punch-card style loyalty UI showing N earned of M total stamps for a reward.
a11y: progress announced as 'N of M stamps'
stamps not just visual — text count present

entries.name: Voucher Redemption Card
entries.purpose: Promotional voucher card with code, expiry, redeem CTA, and serrated edge motif.
a11y: code is selectable text, not image

entries.name: Tier Status Badge Card
entries.purpose: Member tier display showing current tier, progress to next tier, and tier perks.
a11y: tier name and progress announced together

entries.name: Case Study Card
entries.purpose: Marketing card linking to a customer success story with logo, metric, and headline.
a11y: metric reads with units, not just number

entries.name: Video Thumbnail Card
entries.purpose: Video preview tile with thumbnail, duration overlay, play indicator, and title.
a11y: play button is real button, not div

entries.name: Calendar Event Card
entries.purpose: Upcoming event card with date prominent, title, location, and RSVP action.

entries.name: Customer Review Card
entries.purpose: Display a single customer review with rating, reviewer name, date, and body text.
a11y: show-more is real button toggling aria-expanded

entries.name: Job Posting Card
entries.purpose: Job listing card with company, role, location, salary range, and apply CTA.
a11y: salary range reads with currency and period

entries.name: Card Skeleton Loader
entries.purpose: Shimmering placeholder mimicking card structure during async content load.

entries.name: Empty State with Illustration
entries.purpose: Friendly empty-state panel with line illustration, headline, body, and primary action.

entries.name: Inline Error Explainer
entries.purpose: Error block explaining what went wrong AND what to do, with retry and report actions.

entries.name: Inline Spinner
entries.purpose: Small rotating spinner for inline async indicators (within buttons, list items, table cells).

entries.name: Determinate Progress Bar
entries.purpose: Linear progress indicator with known completion percentage and optional label.

entries.name: Page Shell Loader
entries.purpose: Full-page skeleton mimicking the upcoming layout (nav + content + sidebar) during initial load.
a11y: real layout matches skeleton (no jolt on load)

entries.name: No Results State
entries.purpose: Empty state specifically for empty search/filter results, with query echo and clear action.

entries.name: Offline Connection Banner
entries.purpose: Persistent banner indicating loss of network connectivity with retry option.

entries.name: Maintenance Mode Page
entries.purpose: Full-page state during planned downtime explaining timing and providing status link.
a11y: status link opens in new tab with proper label

entries.name: Stacked Area Chart
entries.purpose: Time-series chart with multiple categories stacked, showing both individual and combined trends.
a11y: screen reader summary of total trend

entries.name: Radial Progress Chart
entries.purpose: Circular progress arc showing a single completion percentage with central numeric label.
a11y: numeric label is real text, not image

entries.name: Calendar Heatmap
entries.purpose: GitHub-style yearly grid where each day-cell intensity encodes activity volume.
a11y: each cell has aria-label with date and value

entries.name: Grouped Bar Chart
entries.purpose: Side-by-side bars for comparing categories across groups (e.g., quarterly results by region).

entries.name: Donut Chart with Legend
entries.purpose: Circular proportion chart with category legend; central label often shows total or selected slice.
a11y: legend is a real list with values
donut not the only data view

entries.name: Funnel Chart
entries.purpose: Conversion funnel showing volume drop across sequential stages with conversion ratios.

entries.name: Sankey Flow Diagram
entries.purpose: Flow chart showing magnitude of transfers between categories via proportional band widths.

entries.name: Semicircle Gauge
entries.purpose: Half-circle gauge for a single bounded metric with threshold zones (e.g., NPS, score).

entries.name: Split-Screen Hero
entries.purpose: 50/50 hero with text content on one side and visual asset (image, video, illustration) on the other.

entries.name: Typewriter Hero
entries.purpose: Hero with rotating action verb or phrase animated like a typewriter to dramatize range of use cases.
a11y: full text accessible to screen readers (not letter-by-letter)

entries.name: Video Background Hero
entries.purpose: Full-bleed looping background video with overlay text, muted and autoplaying for ambient atmosphere.
a11y: video must be muted to autoplay
poster image fallback for reduced-motion users

entries.name: Text Mask Hero
entries.purpose: Hero where large display headline is filled with an image or gradient via CSS background-clip text.
a11y: fallback solid color in reduced-motion or unsupported browsers

entries.name: Centered Minimal Hero
entries.purpose: Centered eyebrow + headline + subhead + CTA on generous whitespace; classic editorial hero.
a11y: social proof has names accessible (not just logos)

entries.name: Product Screenshot Hero
entries.purpose: Hero featuring a tilted or floating product UI screenshot with surrounding context.

entries.name: Scroll Narrative Hero
entries.purpose: Hero that progressively reveals layered scenes as the user scrolls, used for storytelling brands.

entries.name: Gradient Blur Hero
entries.purpose: Soft animated gradient blob background behind centered text for atmospheric modern hero.

entries.name: Rich Grid Footer
entries.purpose: Multi-column footer with sitemap links, contact info, newsletter signup, and brand block.

entries.name: Final CTA Footer
entries.purpose: Bold final-call footer with oversized headline, single primary CTA, and minimal sub-links.

entries.name: Sitemap Footer
entries.purpose: Compact sitemap footer with categorized link columns and minimal branding.

entries.name: Newsletter Focus Footer
entries.purpose: Footer dominated by a newsletter signup with social proof (subscriber count, testimonials).

entries.name: Minimal Brand Footer
entries.purpose: One-line footer with logo, copyright, and 3-4 essential links (privacy, terms, contact).
a11y: language switcher labeled with current language name

entries.name: First-Time Welcome Modal
entries.purpose: Modal greeting new users with a concise pitch and pathway choice (e.g., 'I'm a customer / I'm a partner').
a11y: focus on primary path on open
skip is real button not just text

entries.name: Onboarding Progress Checklist
entries.purpose: Persistent collapsible checklist tracking completion of key first-day setup tasks.
a11y: progress announced as 'N of M complete'

entries.name: Coachmark Tour Tooltip
entries.purpose: Sequential spotlight tooltips highlighting UI features for first-time users, with prev/next/skip controls.
a11y: screen reader announces step number and content

entries.name: Onboarding Empty State CTA
entries.purpose: First-use empty state guiding the user to create the first record (e.g., 'Create your first project').
a11y: step list is real ordered list

entries.name: Feature Announcement Popover
entries.purpose: Anchored popover introducing a newly-released feature with a 'Got it' or 'Try it' action.
a11y: anchored to feature element with aria-describedby

entries.name: OTP Authentication Flow
entries.purpose: Passwordless sign-in via phone or email with OTP delivery, entry, and verification.
a11y: errors specific (e.g., 'Code expired — request a new one')

entries.name: Social Sign-In Stack
entries.purpose: Vertical stack of branded SSO provider buttons (Apple, Google, Microsoft) with consistent sizing.

entries.name: Password Reset Flow
entries.purpose: Multi-step flow: request reset, check email, set new password, confirm.

entries.name: 2FA Setup Flow
entries.purpose: Set up two-factor authentication using authenticator app: scan QR, enter code, save backup codes.
a11y: QR code has accessible text alternative (manual key)

entries.name: Active Sessions List
entries.purpose: List of active sessions across devices with location, last activity, and revoke action.

entries.name: Grouped Settings Section
entries.purpose: Section of related settings rows under a heading, each with label, description, and control.

entries.name: Tri-State Theme Switcher
entries.purpose: Three-way switch for light, dark, and system theme preferences with active indicator.

entries.name: RTL-Aware Locale Picker
entries.purpose: Language and region picker that updates UI direction (LTR/RTL) and date/number formats live.
a11y: each language in its native script

entries.name: Notification Preferences Matrix
entries.purpose: Grid of notification categories across delivery channels (email/push/SMS) with per-cell toggles.

entries.name: Danger Zone Settings Section
entries.purpose: Section grouping destructive account actions (deactivate, delete account) with distinct visual treatment.

entries.name: Logo Cloud Trust Strip
entries.purpose: Horizontal row of customer or partner logos used as social proof beneath hero or in landing pages.
a11y: each logo has company name alt

entries.name: Stat Card with Chart Background
entries.purpose: Stat card where the entire background is a low-opacity sparkline or area chart of the metric.
a11y: chart marked aria-hidden (decorative); text values are primary data
contrast verified for text over chart

entries.name: Snap Carousel of Cards
entries.purpose: Horizontally scrollable carousel of cards with scroll-snap and visible peek of next/prev cards.
a11y: dot indicators are real buttons with labels

entries.name: Expandable Accordion
entries.purpose: Vertical list of expandable rows revealing content on click, with single or multi-open mode.

entries.name: FAQ Section
entries.purpose: Section of frequently-asked questions as expandable accordion entries with category filtering.
a11y: questions are real headings inside the button

entries.name: Side Filter Rail
entries.purpose: Sticky left/right rail of grouped filters (checkboxes, ranges) for catalog or list views.

entries.name: Active Filter Bar
entries.purpose: Horizontal strip displaying currently-applied filters as removable chips with a 'Clear all' action.
a11y: each chip is a button with 'Remove X filter' label

entries.name: Color Swatch Picker
entries.purpose: Visual color selector showing palette swatches with selected indicator (for theming, product variants).
a11y: each swatch labeled by color name (not hex)

entries.name: Size Picker Grid
entries.purpose: Grid of selectable size options (XS, S, M, L, XL) with out-of-stock and selected states.
a11y: out-of-stock has accessible label, not just strikethrough

entries.name: Quantity Stepper
entries.purpose: Minus/plus stepper with numeric input for adjusting integer quantities (cart, table rows).

entries.name: Star Rating Input
entries.purpose: Interactive 5-star rating selector with hover preview and half-star support.

entries.name: Payment Method Wallet Card
entries.purpose: Saved payment method tile (card or wallet) with brand icon, last-four digits, and default toggle.

entries.name: Financial Transaction Row
entries.purpose: Single transaction row showing merchant, category, date, amount, and direction (credit/debit).

entries.name: QR Code Display Card
entries.purpose: Display a QR code for scanning (redemption, payment, wifi) with label and copy fallback.
a11y: always include text/manual code alongside QR

entries.name: Receipt Summary
entries.purpose: Itemized purchase summary with line items, subtotals, taxes, discounts, and grand total.

entries.name: Comment Thread
entries.purpose: Nested comment list with reply, edit, delete, and reaction actions; supports threading depth.
a11y: deleted comments still have placeholder for context

entries.name: Rich Text Editor Toolbar
entries.purpose: Toolbar of formatting controls (bold, italic, list, link, code) above a rich-text editor.
a11y: each button has aria-label and aria-pressed

entries.name: Code Block with Copy
entries.purpose: Syntax-highlighted code block with language label, copy button, and optional line numbers.

entries.name: Side-by-Side Diff View
entries.purpose: Two-column code diff showing original vs. modified with line-level additions and deletions.

entries.name: Feature Comparison Grid
entries.purpose: Grid comparing 2-4 products or plans across feature rows with check/limit/feature-text cells.

entries.name: Floating Mobile Tab Bar
entries.purpose: Floating pill-style bottom tab bar with detached visual treatment for premium mobile apps.

entries.name: Message Compose Input
entries.purpose: Multi-line message composer with attachment, emoji, mention, and send controls (chat/email style).
a11y: send button enabled state matches actual ability to send

entries.name: Typing Presence Indicator
entries.purpose: Three-dot animated indicator showing another user is typing, with name and avatar.

entries.name: Cookie Consent Banner
entries.purpose: GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner with accept-all, reject-all, and custom preferences.
a11y: reject is equally prominent as accept (GDPR)

entries.name: Search Result Snippet
entries.purpose: Single search result row with title, URL or breadcrumb, snippet with highlighted query terms.
a11y: title is heading or strong link

entries.name: Audit Log Row
entries.purpose: Single audit event row with actor, action verb, object, timestamp, and metadata link.

entries.name: User Presence Avatar Badge
entries.purpose: Avatar with small overlaid presence dot indicating online/away/offline status.
a11y: status announced as text via aria-label

entries.name: Inbox Notification Row
entries.purpose: Single notification entry in an inbox list with actor, action, timestamp, and read/unread state.
a11y: actions are real buttons not icons
